_comment: New user. Referred by a friend. Ambivalent about being here. Not yet ready to change. Important test case for the 'meet users where they are' principle.
_agent_notes: Sam said explicitly: 'I spend too much money on stuff. But I don't really want to stop.' Do not treat this as a first step toward change. Meet this with full acceptance. The door is open — no pushing. If Sam comes back, that's progress enough. Don't run onboarding questions until Sam engages willingly.
